---
title: "Michael Gethers"
listing:
  id: writing-list
  contents: "posts/*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description]
---

I'm an applied data scientist with 12 years of experience building data and 
machine learning systems at production scale. My background is in statistics 
at UC Berkeley, and my work has spanned the full range from statistical modeling 
to production ML infrastructure, most recently including work at **McLaren Racing** and 
in my current role at **Silent Push**.

I'm deepening my research foundation in transformers, reinforcement learning, 
and agentic systems, with a focus on applications to sensor data and 
infrastructure analysis. This site is where I write about what I'm building 
and learning.

---

## Writing
:::{#writing-list}
:::
